description_long: This is a large, cylindrical metal barrel with a weathered red exterior and a wide, off-white horizontal band encircling its middle. The barrel features visible scratches, scuffs, and signs of wear, suggesting prolonged outdoor or industrial use. On one side of the white band, there is a prominent black biohazard warning symbol inside a triangle, indicating the barrel may be used for hazardous or contaminated materials. The top and bottom rims are reinforced with slightly raised metal bands, adding structural strength. The surface finish is matte and rough, with a hard metallic texture. There are no visible handles or spouts, and the lid appears to be fixed in place.
description: A large, weathered red metal barrel with a white band and a biohazard warning symbol, reinforced by metal hoops and showing signs of heavy use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the biohazard warning symbol on the white band.
description_view_1: Side view with the white band visible but no markings or symbols.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, with only the white band and no visible markings.
description_view_3: Angled view showing the edge of the biohazard symbol partially visible on the white band.
attribute_banding_or_reinforcement: metal hoops at top, middle, and bottom
attribute_labeling_or_markings: biohazard warning symbol in black on white band
